feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Date Time Stamp Issue
entry.content:
All action in sap b1 v10 appear with the same time. The date changes day to day but the time always remains at 12.00 am. Can't see why!

 

Thanks in advance,

Simon.

entry.title: Date Control is not rendered properly in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Date component is rendering behind the table and user is not able to select the date as well.

entry.title: Get logged in user data in SAP Build Work Zone Advance edition
entry.content: I have deployed an application and made a tile in sap build workzone advance edition. In the deployed application I want to send the userId/Usercode/email any of the mentioned which is assigned to me in the payload. Help me to get the login data from sap build workzone advance edition.

entry.title: Delete imported project from Build Process Automation Lobby
entry.content: I could not find any option to delete imported project. How to delete imported project from the SAP Build Process Automation Lobby?

entry.title: error while activating process automation content in SAP Build store
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the exercise mentioned in PDF file. When I click on "Add" I am getting the below error at STEP 15. Please let me know how to resolve this error.

Activating Process Automation Content 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Hi, I am unable to capture combo box and drop down using SAP BPA desktop studio for SAP fiori APP.
entry.content:
Hi, when I was trying to do UI automation of SAP Fiori application using SAP business process automation desktop studio, I am facing the issue mentioned in the subject.

It is not capturing the required fields and objects.

Can you guide me how can I do it.

@Chaitanya_Priya @peterengel @BorisAndree 

I am trying to work on this screen

and using these options from Desktop studio:

entry.title: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the tutorial in the Task 2: Install Data Integration and I am getting the below popup every time I select my BTP Destination as my trail account. Also, as mentioned in the exercise, if I search with S4HC_SAMLASSERTION_PO or MOCK_PURCHASE_ORDER, it is not showing me any values. I am using my BTP trail account. Please help me on how to proceed on this.

 

 

 

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - is there a way to create a table with columns displayed selected by users?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a possibility to create a table in SAP Build Apps, let's say with data retrieved from S4 system via oData (Z* table from S4 with let's say 50 columns), but in Build Apps users can choose which data is displayed (which columns are displayed)? Cause we can create Basic Tables with 'static' columns, but what if we've very large tables (e.g. from S4) and we cannot decide which columns is relevant for particular user, so we have to allow users to decide what columns they want to see.

We do have this kind of feature in old ALVs and Fioris, but what about SAP Build?

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content:
Hi, @Dan_Wroblewski 

In response to the above statement, I have ensured that the data type is set to Integer. I will attach the screenshot below. Additionally, I have passed this payload  from Postman

 {
        "job input": [
                {
                    "JobCount": 8190900,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-1"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191000,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-2"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191200,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-3"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191300,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-4"
                }
]}

entry.title: Why is the 'match' function not working on a String in my RPA project?
Missing records in history (Sales Order Change Log)
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently using SAP B1 FP 2022

Background: 
I developed a program to track changes in certain fields (ORDR) by comparing the UpdateDate in (ADOC).
If ORDR.UpdateDate = yesterday, then I will compare the fields with the previous record in

 

SELECT TOP 1 UpdateDate FROM ADOC WHERE UpdateDate < FORMAT(DATEADD(day,-1, GETDATE()), 'dd.MMM.yyyy' ORDER BY UpdateDate DESC

 

Intermittent issues:
The UpdateDate or the whole history record on that particular date is somehow missing or "deleted" after a few days.
For example, my program traced changes on 10th May, which were recorded in my report on that day.
However, on 14th May the same changes were recorded again in my report. When I checked the (ADOC), the history record based on UpdateDate = 10th May has completely "vanished" from the database.
There is no record with UpdateDate = 10th May.                                

This issue was only spotted on a few Sales Order and happened randomly.
I believe the query is fine as it's (the program) been running fine for almost a year.
AFAIK this 2nd or 3rd encountered since the program has been running ever since.
This issue left me puzzled and clueless.

I appreciate any feedback and help from you. Thanks.

entry.title: Destination and Cloud Connector Configured, but Services Not Visible in SAP Build (BAS)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue with my SAP Build (BAS) environment. I have successfully added a destination and established a Cloud Connector connection to my on-premise S/4HANA system. The connection is successful, as indicated by the green dot in the Cloud Connector.

However, when I log into SAP Build (BAS), the green dot that indicates the active status is not visible for the system, and I cannot see any of the services to use.

Thanks,.

entry.title: Is there a way to access SAP Build Backend in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi,

does anyone know if there is any way to access the SAP Build backend like visual cloud functions in SAP Build Process Automation? I have an approval workflow and need to save the result in our backend. But I can't find a way to do it.

Best regards,

Bastian

entry.title: Accelerator Hub APIs in Japanese (!?)
entry.content:
I created a destination to:

https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER

But when I try to create an Action in the SAP Build lobby they appear in Japanese.

entry.title: SAP Build apps local preview issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are developing apps in build apps in our customer subaccount. It was working perfectly fine till last week but from this week i have a problem running apps locally.

The dolan timestamp goes to error 

After few seconds i get network error like below

The same app from the same build lobby works fine for my other colleagues. Am i missing some config?? What would have changed suddenly. 

@beapasch - Any ideas on this issue?

Thanks and Regards,

Navya

entry.title: No deployment found for project version error in SBPA when using Actions in form
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am getting below error while opening a value help in form.
"No deployment found for project version "
I could see the Action working , when tested in Actions.
Please help me with this.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Is there any standard options to make a bulletin board function in SAP Sales Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi. I'm working on a project to make a bulletin board something like Q&A, or some place where Sales managers can communicate with Field managers. Is it available with only standard functions of Sales Cloud? Or do I need to add a custom field modification on Buildapps?

 

I added an example image of reddit main page. I want to make something like this.

entry.title: How to get the HTML code of a website with SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content: Hallo zusammen, ich versuche einen Prozess zu erstellen, um die Preise einiger Produkte zu prüfen. Dazu muss ich einige Links auf einer aufgezeichneten Website öffnen und den HTML-Code daraus abrufen. Ich finde in SAP BPA keine Aktivität, um den Code abzurufen. Hat jemand eine Idee, wie ich dieses Problem lösen kann?

entry.title: Migration of Workflow to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

My team and I are currently engaged in migrating workflows from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). We have been following the guidelines outlined in the documentation available at SAP Help Portal. However, we encountered an issue during step 4, which requires the import of the MTAR file from the old workflow, as there was no content available in the Manage Package application. Upon attempting this, we received the following error:

Additionally, it is important to note that our workflow module does not contain any "*.extension" files or any "packageinfo".

We seek your guidance on resolving this issue and would appreciate confirmation on whether our current approach is appropriate.

Furthermore, we plan to utilize BPA exclusively for workflow development. Could you please advise if it is feasible to edit the workflows directly within BPA after importing them, or will we need to continue using BAS for older workflows?

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
Paul

entry.title: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My team and I are currently developing an application that requires the integration of workflows. It has come to my attention that SAP is actively addressing this topic, with an update released on August 16th.

At present, we are encountering issues when attempting to import these workflows into SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). I came across a community post from a year ago in which an SAP expert mentioned that workflows developed within BAS could only be managed and updated within BAS. Our intention was to use BPA exclusively for development.

Given the recent update, we would appreciate clarification on whether it is now possible to use BPA as the sole development environment, or if we are still required to manage the older workflows in BAS.

For reference, here is the community post from a year ago:
Workflow Migration 

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

Gabriel
